articles.title: What is Writers’ Building? History, politics and BJP’s plan to shift Bengal Secretariat back
articles.description: The Writers’ Building is considered one of Kolkata’s most important heritage landmarks. It combines classical European and neo-classical architectural styles, featuring long red facades, Corinthian columns and Greco-Roman design influences.

articles.title: Bengaluru: Azim Premji University student suspended for 2 years over Feb 24 campus ruckus; peers protest
articles.description: APU protest: Students at Azim Premji University staged a sit-in after a student was suspended for two years over the February 24 campus violence linked to a Kunan Poshpora discussion. Protesters alleged the action was arbitrary and unfair.

articles.title: Liberty crush Sun in WNBA season opener behind Breanna Stewart’s big performance
articles.description: Breanna Stewart powered the New York Liberty to a resounding 106-75 season-opening win over the Connecticut Sun. Stewart's stellar 31-point, 10-rebound performance, including crossing 6,000 career points, led the charge. Despite missing key players, the Liberty showcased offensive prowess and capitalized on turnovers, sending a strong early message to the league.

articles.title: Sohail Khan announces next directorial My Punjabi Nikaah with Sanjay Dutt and Aayush Sharma in lead roles
articles.description: Filmmaker Sohail Khan has officially announced his upcoming directorial My Punjabi Nikaah, bringing together Sanjay Dutt and Aayush Sharma in a fresh on-screen pairing that has already sparked interest.

articles.title: Suvendu deeply connected to people: Modi wishes Bengal CM 'fruitful tenure'
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday congratulated Suvendu Adhikari on taking oath as West Bengal's first BJP chief minister, saying that he was deeply connected to the people and understood their aspirations. Adhikari took the oath at the iconic Brigade Parade Grounds in the presence of Modi, Union Home Minister Amit Shah, the BJP's central leadership and chief ministers of NDA-ruled states. In his message for Adhikari, Modi wished the first BJP chief minister of the state a "fruitful tenure". "Congratulations to Suvendu Adhikari Ji on taking oath as West Bengal's chief minister. He has made a mark as a leader who remained deeply connected to the people and understood their aspirations from close quarters," Modi wrote on X after attending the event. "My best wishes to him for a fruitful tenure ahead," he wrote and posted with the message an image of Goddess Durga and another of him congratulating Adhikari on the stage.

articles.title: Q4 Results Next Week: Nearly 500 Companies To Declare Earnings; List Here
articles.description: PVR Inox, Dixon Technologies, Dr Reddys Laboratories, Tata Steel, Cipla, JSW Steel and NCC, among others will declare earnings from May 11 and 16.

articles.title: TTV Dhinakaran accuses Vijay's TVK of using a forged support letter

articles.title: Six companies, six tricks in Indian balance sheets, and how investors get taken for a ride
articles.description: Whenever an Indian company imports goods, borrows in foreign currency, earns overseas revenue, or runs a foreign subsidiary, forex accounting enters the picture. But this is not just a currency note buried in the accounts. The rules decide whether exchange gains and losses hit profit and loss, sit in equity reserves, or make the numbers look cleaner than the business reality. This story explains why investors should not ignore the forex line, how judgement can change reported profit and net worth, and what they must check before trusting the headline numbers.

articles.title: Iran HITS BACK As US Super Hornets Strike Supertankers; IRGC Engages Navy Destroyers
articles.description: The "fragile ceasefire" in the Gulf has collapsed into open warfare. In a massive escalation, the U.S. military has begun launching airstrikes against supertankers attempting to bypass the naval blockade on Iran. CENTCOM confirms that over 70 vessels—capable of carrying 166 million barrels of oil—have been halted, with two VLCCs already disabled at sea. With the IRGC confirming direct naval combat against U.S. ships, the Strait of Hormuz is no longer a trade route; it is a front line.

articles.title: Twitch CEO Dan Clancy announces stricter action against viewbotting
articles.description: Twitch is implementing a new system to combat viewbotting, a practice where streamers artificially inflate viewer numbers. Starting in May, repeat offenders will face concurrent viewership caps based on their real traffic, with penalties escalating for persistent violations. The platform aims to create a fairer environment for legitimate creators by addressing fake engagement.

articles.title: Quote of the day by George Michael: 'Only time will set you free...' Life lessons on peace, success and human nature by legendary British singer and songwriter

It also reflects the journey of George Michael from Wham! to solo success, personal struggles, and legacy in music. The message focuses on patience, growth, freedom, and self-acceptance.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM announcement: Governor cannot question majority stitched post-poll
articles.description: Supreme Court rulings consistently state governors must invite the largest party or alliance to form government post-election, without questioning how support was gained. The apex court has warned against dismissing governments or dissolving assemblies based on 'fanciful assumptions' of horse-trading, emphasizing that majority must be proven on the floor of the House.

articles.title: Bokaro STPI project fails to take off despite land allotment in 2017
articles.description: The vision for a Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) center in Bokaro, which has been in the works for almost a decade, is stalling due to inadequate funding from the state government. Despite securing land in 2017 for a sprawling 55,000-square-foot facility, construction is still at a standstill.

This launch heralds a promising new chapter in the realm of AI for the region.
